slight_left|far|TURN_LEFT|progress.lesson: [slight_left, far] TURN_LEFT → progress +60cm (good). Turn resulted in distance reduction — good realignment.

far_right|close|MOVE_FORWARD|regress.lesson: [far_right, close] MOVE_FORWARD → regress -49cm (bad). Wrong: moving forward when bearing is far_right increases distance. Turn first.

slight_left|close|oscillation|failure_pa.lesson: Oscillation detected: alternating turns without progress. Commit to one turn direction until bearing is within ±30°, then move forward.

far_left|medium|MOVE_FORWARD|regress.lesson: [far_left, medium] MOVE_FORWARD → regress -160cm (bad). Wrong: moving forward when bearing is far_left increases distance. Turn first.

far_left|close|stuck|failure_pattern.lesson: Stuck: forward motion blocked (obstacle or wall). Turn to find a clear path before continuing forward.

slight_right|very_close|MOVE_FORWARD|pro.lesson: [slight_right, very_close] MOVE_FORWARD → progress +195cm (good). Forward progress despite slight_right bearing — path may curve toward goal.

aligned|far|TURN_RIGHT|regress.lesson: [aligned, far] TURN_RIGHT → regress -54cm (bad). Turn increased distance — unusual, check heading.

far_right|close|backtrack|failure_patter.lesson: Wrong direction: moved forward but distance increased by 757cm. Bearing was behind_right. Turn toward goal before moving forward.

far_left|close|oscillation|failure_patte.lesson: Oscillation detected: alternating turns without progress. Commit to one turn direction until bearing is within ±30°, then move forward.

behind_left|close|MOVE_FORWARD|neutral.lesson: [behind_left, close] MOVE_FORWARD → no change. Forward with behind_left bearing yielded no progress. Turn toward goal first.

far_right|far|TURN_LEFT|progress.lesson: [far_right, far] TURN_LEFT → progress +447cm (good). Turn resulted in distance reduction — good realignment.

behind_right|far|TURN_RIGHT|progress.lesson: [behind_right, far] TURN_RIGHT → progress +1783cm (good). Turn resulted in distance reduction — good realignment.

far_left|medium|STOP|neutral.lesson: [far_left, medium] STOP → no change. Premature STOP — still medium from goal.

slight_right|close|backtrack|failure_pat.lesson: Wrong direction: moved forward but distance increased by 246cm. Bearing was behind_left. Turn toward goal before moving forward.

slight_right|medium|backtrack|failure_pa.lesson: Wrong direction: moved forward but distance increased by 131cm. Bearing was behind_left. Turn toward goal before moving forward.

slight_right|close|stuck|failure_pattern.lesson: Stuck: forward motion blocked (obstacle or wall). Turn to find a clear path before continuing forward.

behind_left|far|STOP|neutral.lesson: [behind_left, far] STOP → no change. Premature STOP — still far from goal.
